channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: C++ Raw String Embedded Languages - Fri Apr 24 01:18:38 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: David Bourgault downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: ca.davidbourgault.cppinlinerstring

vendor: David Bourgault downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: ca.davidbourgault.cppinlinerstring.polyline
